headline: Amphenol (APH) Buys CommScope CCS As AI Data Center Wins Build Its Reach
summary: Amphenol (NYSE:APH) has acquired CommScope's CCS business, adding fiber optic capabilities to its data center portfolio. The company has also secured major contracts tied to AI data center infrastructure solutions. These moves come alongside recent earnings beats and increased attention on Amphenol as an AI infrastructure supplier. Amphenol is pushing deeper into AI data center connectivity, with the CommScope CCS acquisition expanding its reach in high performance fiber solutions. The...
